description: Pins the shared missing-linode_id and missing-label rejections and the config-create POST body. devices/size rejection text diverges (see report).

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This creates a configuration profile on the instance. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: rejects an invalid run_level (proto ConfigRunLevel enum)
cases.expect_error: run_level must be one of: default, single, binbash

cases.name: rejects an invalid virt_mode (proto ConfigVirtMode enum)
cases.expect_error: virt_mode must be one of: paravirt, fullvirt

cases.name: rejects an invalid device slot
cases.expect_error: device slot sdz must be one of sda through sdh
